text.title: Accessibility Annotation Pattern Library Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying Accessibility Annotation Pattern Library to a concrete case.

section.title: Worked example: annotated combobox + dialog

example.code:
# Handoff — Search filter combobox + Confirm dialog
## Combobox (search filter) - role: combobox - name: "Filter results" - states: closed, open, filtering, has-selection - keyboard: ArrowDown opens list; Enter selects; Esc closes & restores trigger focus - focus_behaviour: aria-activedescendant on focused listbox option
## Confirm dialog - role: dialog (aria-modal=true) - name: "Delete project?" - states: open, closed - keyboard: Esc closes; Tab traps focus inside; Shift+Tab cycles backward - focus_behaviour: focus the destructive button on open; restore focus to trigger on close

section.note: Both components carry role + name + states + keyboard + focus_behaviour. The handoff doc is a verbatim contract for dev.
